title: Max Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Max Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Max Life Insurance in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!
